zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón於1280年出生在義大利西西利亞時，她的父親Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples26歲，母親Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples23歲。她於1295年10月29日與James II of Aragon House of Barcelona在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納利阿爾特 艾波亞結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1310年10月14日在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿享年30歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿巴薩隆拿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón于1280年出生在意大利西西利亞时，她的父亲Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples26岁，母亲Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples23岁。她于1295年10月29日与James II of Aragon House of Barcelona在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納利阿爾特 艾波亞结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1310年10月14日在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿享年30岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿巴薩隆拿。

nameMeanings.name: d'Anjou
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Anjou, a former province of western France (see Langevin ).

variants.name: Langevin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Henri, Jean-Louis, Pierre, Adelard, Emile, Gaston, Leodore, Lucien, Marcel.

French: habitational name, with fused definite article l', for an Angevin, i.e. for someone from Anjou, a former province of western France that was ruled by a count as an independent territory from the 10th century. The province became a property of the English Crown for fifty years at the end of the 12th century. Compare Longway and Lonsway .

History: Mathurin Langevin dit Lacroix from Le Lude in Sarthe, France, married Marie-Thérèse Martin in Quebec City, QC, in 1674. Michel Langevin from Paris, France, married Marguerite Guertin in Contrecoeur, QC, in 1714. Jean Bergevin dit Langevin from Angers in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Piton in Quebec City, QC, in 1668. Charles Citoleux/Sitoleux dit Langevin from Chambellay in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie-Louise Harel in Montreal, QC, in 1739.

nameMeanings.name: Blanca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón was born in 1280, in Sicily, Italy, her father, Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples, was 26 and her mother, Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples, was 23. She married James II of Aragon House of Barcelona on 29 October 1295, in l'Alt Empordà, Girona, Catalonia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 October 1310, in Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, at the age of 30, and was buried in Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón est née en 1280, à Sicile, Italie, son père, Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé James II of Aragon House of Barcelona le 29 octobre 1295, à l'Alt Empordà, Girona, Catalunya, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 octobre 1310, à Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón 1280 in Sizilien, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples 26 und ihre Mutter Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples 23. Sie hat am 29. Oktober 1295 in l'Alt Empordà, Girona, Catalunya, Spanien James II of Aragon House of Barcelona geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Oktober 1310 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien und wurde in Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón è nata il nel 1280 nel Sicilia, Italia, sua padre, Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato James II of Aragon House of Barcelona il 29 ottobre 1295, nel l'Alt Empordà, Girona, Catalunya, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 ottobre 1310, nel Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragónが1280年にイタリアシシリアで生まれた時，父Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naplesは26歳，母Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naplesは23歳であった。1295年10月29日にスペインカタルニーアギロナル'アルト エンプオルドaでJames II of Aragon House of Barcelonaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1310年10月14日にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナで30歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアバーセロナバーセロナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón(이)가 1280년 이탈리아 시실리야에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1295년 10월 29일 스페인 카털니아 지로나 '알트 포르드a에서 James II of Aragon House of Barcelona(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 10월 14일 스페인 카털니아 바셀나에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 바셀나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón nasceu em 1280, em Sicilia, Itália, seu pai, Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com James II of Aragon House of Barcelona em 29 de outubro de 1295, em l'Alt Empordà, Girona, Catalunya, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de outubro de 1310, em Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón родилась в 1280 г. в местности сисиля, Италия, её отцу по имени Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James II of Aragon House of Barcelona 29 октября 1295 г. в местности л'алт эмпордa, гирона, каталуня, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 октября 1310 г. в местности барселона, каталуня, Испания в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности барселона, барселона, каталуня, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón nació en 1280, en Sicilia, Italia, su papá, Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples, tenía 23 años. Se casó con James II of Aragon House of Barcelona el 29 de octubre de 1295, en Alto Ampurdán, Gerona, Cataluña, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de octubre de 1310, en Barcelona, Cataluña, España, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en Barcelona, Barcelona, Cataluña, España.
